user.bio: Just trying to figure out the puzzle of financial markets

comment.body:
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trading_curb
Read it. 
This is what I refer to at the end of my daily post.
It is in effect. Not every environment is good for intraday reversion trading.
We made reversion tradings when there was no black swan risk and left-tail risk, but steady suppressed intraday vol. 
This is not the same regime. Yet. 
(I may sell vol here betting on liquidity hunt... not decided yet)

But isn't it insane how you came here, we longed Feb, shorted the Feb OpEx (despite everybody called supportive feb opex), shorted the market all the way down, while played for intraday reversion tradings... longed into March OpEx, played the bulltrap while built put positions, and now here we are?

We never been fooled by the market :)))
